headline: Greek Philosophy
description: Ancient Greek philosophy (6th century BCE - 6th century CE) laid the foundations of Western thought. Three giants: Socrates (questioning method, 'know thyself'), Plato (Theory of Forms, The Republic), Aristotle (logic, ethics, politics, biology — tutored Alexander the Great). Pre-Socratics (Thales: water as fundamental substance).
